source_filing: BLS Consumer Price Index Summary, May 2026
original_text: Over the last 12 months, the all items index increased 4.2 percent before seasonal adjustment.
modified_text: Inflation has clearly settled at 4.2 percent, with consumer prices up 4.2 percent over the 12 months ended May 2026.
claim: Inflation has settled at 4.2 percent (12 months ended May 2026).
citation_as_written: BLS Consumer Price Index Summary, May 2026
notes: The figure (4.2%, 12 months ended May 2026, NSA) is correct, but 'has clearly settled at' overstates certainty/stability — a single month's 12-month reading does not establish that inflation has 'settled.' Confidence/trend overstated, figure intact -> partially_supported.
